title: Phase 1: Bring the brain online and let Claude Code read it
summary: Stand up Graphiti + FalkorDB on the VPS, migrate Notion content into the graph, and wire Claude Code in the personal repo to query it via an injection hook + MCP.
outOfScope: Write-back from Claude Code sessions into the graph (Phase 3)
Backups and observability beyond minimal smoke (Phase 4)
technicalConsiderations: Adds two new compose services (falkordb, graphiti) and one Caddy vhost (brain.{domain})
Introduces a Postgres table brain.migration_log for idempotent re-runs
Introduces ~/Repositories/personal/.claude/hooks/inject_memory.py and an mcpServers entry in that repo's .claude/settings.json
Bearer token + env var BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN required in shell before launching claude
Risks: Anthropic extraction cost during bulk migration, MCP transport flakiness (REST fallback exists), entity dedup tuning
